

=== Properties ===
Minimal Height Limit: 7   

Minimal Height: 22   

Maximum Height: 40   

Maximum Height Limit: 60   

Roughness: 10   

Hills: 10   

Chance: 0.02   

Music: Mana-two-part-2   

Valid Player Spawn: False   

=== Structures ===
====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Aqua   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Black   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Blue   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Brown   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Crimson   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Cyan   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Dark Grey   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Green   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Grey   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Indigo   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Lime   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Magenta   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Orange   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Pink   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Purple   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Red   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Violet   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Viridian   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/White   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Ground Patch====
Chance: 0.02   

Block: Chalk/Yellow   

Width: 5   

Variation: 4   

ID: Ground Patch   

depth: 1   

smoothness: 0.5   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Aqua   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Black   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Blue   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Brown   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Crimson   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Cyan   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Dark Grey   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Green   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Grey   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Indigo   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Lime   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Magenta   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Orange   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Pink   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Purple   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Red   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Violet   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Viridian   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/White   

type: Round   

====Simple Tree====
Chance: 0.02   

Log: Air   

Top: Air   

Height: 5   

Height Variation: 20   

ID: Simple Tree   

deltaLeafElongation: 0.15   

leafElongation: 0.5   

leafRadius: 3   

leafRadius_variation: 1   

leaves: Cloth/Block/Yellow   

type: Round   

[[Category:Land_Biomes]]
